description: Configure two new international currencies in SuiteCRM. Log in as 'admin' with password 'Admin1234!'. Add the Euro (Name: 'Euro', Conversion Rate: '0.915', Currency Symbol: '€', ISO 4217 Code: 'EUR', Status: 'Active') and the British Pound (Name: 'British Pound', Conversion Rate: '0.782', Currency Symbol: '£', ISO 4217 Code: 'GBP', Status: 'Active') to the system's active currencies.
